'''鈭歾h-ng-z-zh''' ('''kazhangzezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vasodilate|vasodilate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vasodilate|vasodilate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-ng-z-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazhangzezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
